title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 Release.
overview: Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 has been released.
description: Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 has been released.
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 Release.

Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 has been released.

Red Hat OpenShift Dev Spaces 3.24.1 has been released.



CVE-2025-12548: A flaw was found in Eclipse Che che-machine-exec. This vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote arbitrary command execution and secret exfiltration (SSH keys, tokens, etc.) from other users' Developer Workspace containers, via an unauthenticated JSON-RPC / websocket API exposed on TCP port 3333.
